title: crinum veneficium
intro: Crinum veneficium, also known as the poison lily or deadly lily, is a highly toxic plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Crinum veneficium include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential use as a natural remedy for snake bites. Herbal preparations of Crinum veneficium can be made into a paste or infusion, although extreme caution is advised due to the plant's high toxicity.
